evidence.claim: Built infrastructure processing billions of documents and millions of queries with low latency
evidence.source_text: The system processed billions of documents and served millions of queries with low latency.

evidence.claim: Led a team of 4 engineers at Adobe
evidence.source_text: I had a small team of 4 across this work.

evidence.claim: Grew team from 1 to 6 engineers at Locobuzz
evidence.source_text: The team grew from just me to 6 engineers over the course of that work.

evidence.claim: Grew team from 1 to 6 engineers at Google
evidence.source_text: The team grew from just me to 6 engineers over the course of that work.

evidence.claim: Improved new-user retention by 11% using Thompson sampling
evidence.source_text: I designed an exploration-exploitation policy using Thompson sampling that improved new-user retention by 11% in the first month.

evidence.claim: Shipped production recommendation system from offline to A/B test in 5 months
evidence.source_text: Built and shipped a production recommendation system at a marketplace product, going from offline experimentation to live A/B test in 5 months.

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes Apache Flink, Vector Representations, Deep Learning, Content Matching, Python, PyTorch, QLoRA, LoRA, pgvector, Haystack
evidence.source_text: Skills: Project Management... Vector Representations... Deep Learning... Content Matching... Apache Flink... Feature Engineering... Statistical Modeling... QLoRA... Python... PyTorch... ASR... Data Science... LoRA... Information Retrieval Systems... pgvector... Haystack... Workflow Orchestration... TTS... Natural Language Processing

evidence.claim: Used collaborative filtering, TF-IDF, sentence-transformer embeddings, and behavioral re-ranking
evidence.source_text: The system combined collaborative filtering (matrix factorization), content-based features (TF-IDF + sentence-transformer embeddings), and a behavioral re-ranking layer.

evidence.claim: Prefers shipping v1 in 6 weeks over perfect v2 in 6 months
evidence.source_text: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; I'd rather have a working v1 in 6 weeks than a perfect v2 in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes including over-engineering and optimizing irrelevant metrics
evidence.source_text: I've made the standard mistakes — over-engineering early, optimizing offline metrics that didn't move online numbers, building beautiful infrastructure for features that users didn't actually want — so I notice them faster now.
